name: Mark Kelly
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $4,461,823 for Mark Kelly in U.S. Senate, AZ. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $4,461,823.
